description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle ("AV"), operating in driverless autonomous mode, was at a complete stop in response to a red light on 
eastbound Bush Street in the second leftmost lane at the intersection with Sansome Street. As the AV attempted to maneuver into the left 
turn lane, the AV slowed to a complete stop. A delivery truck traveling behind and to the left of the AV proceeded forward and attempted to 
drive past the AV on the left. Shortly thereafter, the delivery truck made contact with the AV, damaging the AV’s front driver side bumper 
fascia and front driver side wheel opening molding. The driver of the delivery truck left the scene without exchanging information. There 
were no reported injuries.
Print
Clear Form
